productName: Torus - Ceramic Tip (Infused) - Key Lime Cookies x Boston Cream Pie - 1g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Key Lime Pie flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lime, mint, and citrus, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
